channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-13
item.description: Here's a deep-dive segment based on the provided information: | A massive new study from Sweden has uncovered how antibiotic use leaves lasting fingerprints on our gut microbiome. | The findings paint a clear picture: oral antibiotic use within the past eight years is consistently associated with reduced diversity of gut microbiome species.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: Here's a deep-dive segment based on the provided information: | A massive new study from Sweden has uncovered how antibiotic use leaves lasting fingerprints on our gut microbiome. | The findings paint a clear picture: oral antibiotic use within the past eight years is consistently associated with reduced diversity of gut microbiome species.
